Class GameInstance

java.lang.Object
logic.GameInstance
public final class GameInstance extends Object
Control most of the game's main logic.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private int
    currentRoomIndex
    Player's current room.
    private int
    dailyCashReceive
    Cash amount received within current day.
    private int
    dailyCashSpent
    Cash amount spent within current day.
    private int
    dailyOrderServed
    Amount of order served within current day.
    private int
    dayCount
    Number of days passed in the game.
    private ArrayList<FoodOrder>
    foodOrders
    List of all food orders.
    private int
    gameTime
    Current game time.
    Equals to second passed in real life since the game started times TICK_RATE.
    private EnumMap<ItemSpriteType, Integer>
    ingredientOrder
    List of all ingredients player ordered from PC shop.
    private EnumMap<ItemSpriteType, Integer>
    ingredientStock
    Map of stock of all basic ingredients.
    private static GameInstance
    instance
    The singleton instance of GameInstance.
    private Counter
    inventoryCounter
    Counter that holds item on player's hand

    Maximum internal game time counted by game instance.

    Player's current cash amount,

    REAL_GAME_DURATION

    rooms
    List of all rooms.
    static final int
    TICK_RATE
    Amount of times in a second to trigger update of an updatable object.
    private int
    totalCashReceive
    Accumulated cash amount received since the first day.
    private int
    totalCashSpent
    Accumulated cash amount spent since the first day.
    private int
    totalOrderServed
    Accumulated amount of order served since the first day.

  • Field Details

    • instance

      private static GameInstance instance
      The singleton instance of GameInstance.

    • REAL_GAME_DURATION

      public static final int REAL_GAME_DURATION
      Time in second in real life for a single day in a game.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • TICK_RATE

      public static final int TICK_RATE
      Amount of times in a second to trigger update of an updatable object.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • MAX_GAME_TIME

      public static final int MAX_GAME_TIME
      Maximum internal game time counted by game instance. Equals to REAL_GAME_DURATION * TICK_RATE
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • dayCount

      private int dayCount
      Number of days passed in the game.

    • gameTime

      private int gameTime
      Current game time.
      Equals to second passed in real life since the game started times TICK_RATE.

    • playerCash

      private int playerCash
      Player's current cash amount,

    • currentRoomIndex

      private int currentRoomIndex
      Player's current room.

      List of all rooms.

      ItemSprite on player's hand

      Counter that holds item on player's hand

      private EnumMap<ItemSpriteType, Integer> ingredientStock
      Map of stock of all basic ingredients.

    • foodOrders

      private ArrayList<FoodOrder> foodOrders
      List of all food orders.

    • ingredientOrder

      private EnumMap<ItemSpriteType, Integer> ingredientOrder
      List of all ingredients player ordered from PC shop.

      private int dailyCashReceive
      Cash amount received within current day.

      private int totalCashReceive
      Accumulated cash amount received since the first day.

      Cash amount spent within current day.

      Accumulated cash amount spent since the first day.

  • Method Details

    • newGame

      private void newGame()
      Set up new game session.

    • getInstance

      public static GameInstance getInstance()
      Getter for static field instance to make sure only one instance is running at a time.
      Returns:
      GameInstance object

    • resetInstance

      public static void resetInstance()
      Reset current instance and restart timer.

    • initAndBuildRooms

      private void initAndBuildRooms()
      Initialize all the rooms.

    • initIngredientStock

      private void initIngredientStock()
      Initialize ingredientStock field

    • startTimer

      private void startTimer()
      Start and handling timer.

    • increaseIngredientInStock

      public void increaseIngredientInStock(ItemSpriteType itemSpriteType, int amount)
      Increasing the amount of item specified by itemType parameter in the stock according to amount parameter.
      Parameters:
      itemSpriteType - Type of item which its stock will be increased.
      amount - Number of item to increase the stock.

    • reduceIngredientInStock

      public void reduceIngredientInStock(ItemSpriteType itemSpriteType, int amount)
      Reducing the amount of item specified by itemType parameter in the stock according to amount parameter.
      Parameters:
      itemSpriteType - Type of item which its stock will be reduced.
      amount - Number of item to reduce the stock.

    • getIngredientInStockAmount

      public int getIngredientInStockAmount(ItemSpriteType itemSpriteType)
      Getter method for getting the amount of item remained in the stock.
      Parameters:
      itemSpriteType - Type of item to check the amount.
      Returns:
      Amount of an item in the stock for that itemType specified by itemType parameter.

    • setIngredientInStock

      public void setIngredientInStock(ItemSpriteType itemSpriteType, int amount)
      Setter method for setting item amount in the stock.
      Parameters:
      itemSpriteType - Type of item to set amount in the stock.
      amount - Number to set amount of item remained in the stock.

    • isOutOfIngredientInStock

      public boolean isOutOfIngredientInStock(ItemSpriteType itemSpriteType)
      Check whether if the item specified by itemType parameter is out of stock or not
      Parameters:
      itemSpriteType - Type of item to check whether out of stock or not
      Returns:
      true if item is out of stock (amount of item is less than or equal to zero)

    • getCurrentRoom

      public Room getCurrentRoom()
      Getter method for current room according to the field currentRoomIndex.
      Returns:
      Room object

    • changeRoom

      public void changeRoom(WalkDirection direction)
      Changing currentRoomIndex field according to given walk direction.
      Parameters:
      direction - Direction of walking

    • isPlayerHandEmpty

      public boolean isPlayerHandEmpty()
      Checking whether player is having item in the hand inventory slot or not.
      Returns:
      true if player hand is empty

    • getPlayerItemOnHand

      public ItemSprite getPlayerItemOnHand()
      Getter for playerItemOnHand field.
      Returns:
      ItemSprite playerItemOnHand

    • setPlayerItemOnHand

      public void setPlayerItemOnHand(ItemSprite playerItemOnHand)
      Setter for playerItemOnHand field.
      Parameters:
      playerItemOnHand - ItemSprite to be set to player hand inventory slot.

    • getDayCount

      public int getDayCount()
      Getter for dayCount field.
      Returns:
      int dayCount

    • isLastDay

      public boolean isLastDay()
      Determine whether today is the last day or not.
      Returns:
      true if dayCount is greater or equal to maximumDay

    • nextDay

      public void nextDay()
      Perform a set of action to change the day
      1. Read the ingredient order and increase it
      2. Refill container in the stock
      3. Clear ingredients from all the room and from player's hand
      4. Reset and start timer
      5. Clear the order rack
      6. Reset daily statistics
      7. Reset all room's UI

    • getGameTime

      public int getGameTime()
      Getter method for gameTime field.
      Returns:
      int gameTime

    • getPlayerCash

      public int getPlayerCash()
      Getter method for playerCash field.
      Returns:
      int playerCash

    • setPlayerCash

      public void setPlayerCash(int cash)
      Sets the player's cash to a specific amount.
      Parameters:
      cash - the new cash amount

    • increasePlayerCash

      public void increasePlayerCash(int amount)
      Increase player's cash by a specific amount.
      Parameters:
      amount - Amount of player's cash to be increased

    • reducePlayerCash

      public void reducePlayerCash(int amount)
      Reduce player's cash by a specific amount.
      Parameters:
      amount - Amount of player's cash to be reduced.

    • getInventoryCounter

      public Counter getInventoryCounter()
      Getter method for Counter object inventoryCounter which is act as an inventory slot.
      Returns:
      Counter inventoryCounter

    • getRooms

      public ArrayList<Room> getRooms()
      Getter method for rooms ArrayList which contains all the rooms.
      Returns:
      ArrayList contains all the rooms.

    • getCurrentRoomIndex

      public int getCurrentRoomIndex()
      Getter method for currentRoomIndex field.
      Returns:
      int currentRoomIndex

    • setCurrentRoomIndex

      private void setCurrentRoomIndex(int currentRoomIndex)
      Setter method for currentRoomIndex field.
      Parameters:
      currentRoomIndex - room index to be set.

    • randomNewOrder

      private void randomNewOrder()
      Add new order to the orders ArrayList

    • updateOrderRack

      private void updateOrderRack()
      Updating order rack UI in the serving room

    • getFoodOrders

      public ArrayList<FoodOrder> getFoodOrders()
      Getter method for ArrayList of orders
      Returns:
      ArrayList of orders

    • serveOrder

      public void serveOrder(FoodOrder order)
      Serve the order given in parameter.
      If the serve counter has ingredients, it calculates how similar ingredients are
      to the specific order.
      If the serve counter has no ingredient, then nothing happens.
      Parameters:
      order - FoodOrder to serve.

    • getServeCounter

      private ServeCounter getServeCounter()
      Get server counter from serving room
      Returns:
      the serve counter

    • makeAnIngredientOrder

      public void makeAnIngredientOrder(ItemSpriteType itemSpriteType)
      Increase the amount of ingredient to order from the computer shop.
      Parameters:
      itemSpriteType - A type of item to order from the computer shop.

    • getIngredientOrder

      public EnumMap<ItemSpriteType, Integer> getIngredientOrder()
      Getter method of ingredientOrder EnumMap
      Returns:
      An EnumMap of type of item to order and a number of the item to order.

    • getDailyCashReceive

      public int getDailyCashReceive()
      Getter for daily cash received amount
      Returns:
      daily cash received amount

    • getTotalCashReceive

      public int getTotalCashReceive()
      Getter for total cash received amount.
      Returns:
      total cash received amount

    • getDailyCashSpent

      public int getDailyCashSpent()
      Getter for daily cash spent amount.
      Returns:
      daily cash spent amount

    • getTotalCashSpent

      public int getTotalCashSpent()
      Getter for total cash spent amount.
      Returns:
      total cash spent amount

    • getDailyOrderServed

      public int getDailyOrderServed()
      Getter for daily order served amount.
      Returns:
      daily order served amount

    • getTotalOrderServed

      public int getTotalOrderServed()
      Getter for total order served amount.
      Returns:
      total order served amount

    • calculatePlayerEfficiencyScore

      public double calculatePlayerEfficiencyScore()
      Calculate player's efficiency score
      formula : Math.clamp( (playerCash - 100) / maximumDay )
      Returns:
      player's efficiency score

    • getPlayerFinalRating

      public String getPlayerFinalRating()
      Rates player's play performance by final player's efficiency score
      Returns:
      Rating text
